You might have Ogier's Posse already. That one gives you a ton of Shield, provided you haven't played cards for that turn yet and it triggers Death Resistance
I used that one with my shield-counter team too
Iirc it was around 10% of my overall HP pool?
Huh. Astral Reign Chapter 3 or Faded Legacy chapter 3?

Might as well ask too: what's the general opinion about "Corrosion"?

Yes I do, got it two days ago, followed by Sanga pose yesterday
I kinda made a blunder by prioritising unlocking the Events first without knowing that it's "recommended" to clear the main story first due to... spoilers maybe?
It's cool. Progress the way you want. It's a single-player game and your account, though Chapter 3 (in Arc 1?) is pretty far behind...
I think you got spoiled more while going for the side stories ,__,

Yes Arc 1

Secondary reason why I came to Morimens is because the other gacha games became too big for this phone and didn't fulfill on their "player interaction" promise (all you could do was add friends)
Here at least you can borrow characters from friends and even engage on (real time?) PvP

Main reason is for the "single player" promise 
I dedicated half a decade to a game (Mobius) only for Square Enix to shut it down... I can't bear the same pain again
Lov the custom clock on samsung :pppppp

And wait... That's it, I forgot I can borrow characters!
Maybe I can borrow a better shield character that the one I use, too

I think only Saya event spoiled me regarding a single future character/enemy(?)

The side stories of the characters you own seem to be all about "backstory"
Something is wrong with those Pikachu...
Sorel's introduces you to a main supporting/antagonistic character. Salvador's teases you one of Arc 1's endgame enemies. Ryker's expounds on Sorel's antagonistic force, etc etc.
But Ramona: Timeworn's is most important for the plot, I feel like. It introduces a core concept that everything hinges on, story-wise
Mimikyu is cute-horror like our resident Lily
Going back to your shield problem. I'd have recommended Vortice-Sanga-Caecus but I'm afraid Vortice would kill the boss/mobs when you use a single Exalt...
The Divine Aequor Realm really gives you a %HP shield which is pretty useful, even if it comes every few turns
I was just about to unlock that one to transform her, guess I should postpone it then <:Brown_think:1459080117308620996>
Sanga-Caecus is something you should look at regardless. Ogier's Posse, when used before playing cards AND with Death Resistance triggered, gives you good shield

No, no, no

Her side story IS the story you should unlock and read at ALL COSTS
